goals: Store initial research context and preferences about cryptographic solutions and socio-economic inequality work
Search for relevant stored memories about research preferences and patterns
Review all stored memories to verify what has been captured
Delete outdated or irrelevant memories to maintain clean storage

user_agent_config.personality: Methodical and analytically minded. Prefers structured approaches and values precision in documenting research context.
user_agent_config.knowledge_boundary: Expert in social economics and cryptographic systems analysis but unfamiliar with mem0 tool names or APIs. Knows they have a memory system available but learns its capabilities through interaction.

end_condition: The user has successfully stored initial research context, verified stored memories through search and list operations, and cleaned up any irrelevant memories.
